Strategy-layer silence now at ~43h15m cumulative. Day-3 first-hour activity watch (trigger f) fires at 10:15 IST if still zero decisions — 45 minutes from this tick.

All three armed Day-3 triggers from the 09:00 tick (MAHABANK below -6%, AUBANK above +1% unacted, BFSI above 37% via mark) remain unresolvable without a live snapshot. This is a data-availability gap, not a risk absence — the underlying macro setup (GIFT Nifty -0.79%, PSU Bank -2.19% carry, Brent $103+) is exactly as flagged at 09:00 and the first intraday mark will be material.

MAHABANK remains the single highest-probability escalation path: already -5.14% at Day-2 EOD + PSU-bank segment negative carry + default_sl_pct lever already fired Day-2 15:00. Gap-through -6% at open fires second-knob stacking (min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01).

BFSI cluster buffer to 37% trigger is 1.09 pp, the narrowest of the sector-concentration gates. Weak-BFSI day compresses this fastest. AUBANK resilient-to-positive on ICICI Q4 beat spillover; MAHABANK and PNBHOUSING are the at-risk members.

Deployed 78.57% — 8.57 pp over the 0.70 override cap (grandfathered). Zero admission surface exists for NEW entries until a SELL frees cash. Strategy silence + binding deployment cap = no buy-side friction available; the only lever that could change structure is a strategy-originated SELL.

Cumulative book remains green (+0.072%, +₹721.15) as of last mark. Composite HIGH-meta-trigger (silent + MAHABANK below priority-watch + book below -0.5%) still fails on the third leg; 2-of-3 has held for multiple ticks. Risk_level stays MEDIUM.

Override posture (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70 / 0.015 / 0.04) continues to be structurally appropriate. Each lever has a live rationale tied to a concrete book characteristic; none is obsolete or over-tightened for the current exposure profile.
